metadata.name: Disseminate Information about a Missing Child (Amber Alert)

description: Police issue an Amber Alert for a missing child. An operator must broadcast the alert across the city's communication channels.

nodes.task_description: Receive the Amber Alert details from the state police, including child's description and vehicle information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the critical information for the alert.

nodes.task_description: Draft the alert message for various platforms.
Broadcast the Amber Alert on all city-controlled dynamic message signs on highways, public transit screens, and social media.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully pushes the alert to all available public-facing systems.
